name: Next Level Golf
about: Next Level Golf USA is a year-round indoor golf training facility located in Herndon, Virginia. It features state-of-the-art equipment including 6 hitting stations, 2 private simulator bays, video analysis capabilities, and dedicated chipping and putting areas. The facility serves as the primary training site for the Next Level Golf USA Academy, which uses a specialized 12 Level Golf Performance Program founded by Rick Burk. It also operates an outdoor training facility at the Sterling Park Par 3 Championship Course. The venue offers practice space, professional lessons, and a bar and lounge area for up to 40 people, making it suitable for both individual training and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive 12-level performance program for structured skill development
State-of-the-art technology with launch monitors and video analysis for detailed feedback
Extensive track record of producing successful collegiate golfers and professionals
Dedicated private simulator bays for focused, uninterrupted practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service, but BYOB may be permitted
On-site bar available for lounge area guests

simulator_hardware.notes: 2 simulator bays with OptiShot2 technology offering basic feedback
1 simulator station equipped with FLIGHTSCOPE Mevo+ technology
1 simulator station using Pro-Tee technology with access to 1000+ courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has a bar and lounge area where drinks can be purchased. BYOB policy is not explicitly stated but may be permitted for group events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to complete 18 holes varies depending on simulator used and pace of play. Standard simulator sessions are booked in 30-minute increments.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Next Level Golf USA offers extensive junior programs including camps, tournaments, and a 12 Level Performance Program specifically designed for youth golfers.
